summary: Fix Linux AppImage packaging in WSL
description: Make npm run desktop:build finish successfully on Linux/WSL despite linuxdeploy AppImage/FUSE and icon-name mismatch.
acceptance: npm run desktop:build exits 0 and writes target/release/bundle/appimage/*.AppImage

evidence.summary: Root cause: linuxdeploy AppImage/FUSE plus AppDir icon basename mismatch. Fixed scripts/tauri-build.mjs to set APPIMAGE_EXTRACT_AND_RUN and repair Linux AppImage by copying expected icon basename then running linuxdeploy-plugin-appimage. npm run desktop:build exits 0 and writes target/release/bundle/appimage/Mega_Vault_Viewer-x86_64.AppImage (74M); npm run check exits 0.
